reviews.reviewComments: Will choose this hotel again.
Great team & very helpful toward all the visitor.

Once you open our door you can see the ocean. Great staff with great chef.
Very helpful although it is not include in their service. :) Keep a good work.

1. Limited and unecducated staff with a very low EQ.  
2. Ac spolit and request chg of room.  They request to change and gibe me standing fan. The entire hotel had 1 or 2 guest only.
3. Room not clean at all. Lizard and insects are plents
4. Islamic fanatics. Prayer chatting si loid at 5am.
Totally disappointment

reviews.reviewTitle: Worthless internet connection (Wifi) and worthless staff
reviews.reviewComments:
Literally, the worst place I have ever stayed. Definitely would have preferred to have saved my money and stayed in a ratty youth hostel instead.

1. Far too many bugs in the room.
2. Walls are very thin and could not sleep until the family next door settled down for the night.
3. No toilet paper was provided for check-in.
4. Mostly empty water cooler placed in room.
5. Internet was often down and was not very strong when it was up. I usually only had 1 Mb / s.
6. Staff was unable to fix the internet and was unwilling to refund my money.
7. Internet is effectively not available in the room and comes from the reception area.

My trip to Pulau Weh was ruined and cut short by this miserable property. Please do not stay here.
Will choose this hotel again.
Great team & very helpful toward all the visitor.

Once you open our door you can see the ocean. Great staff with great chef.
Very helpful although it is not include in their service. :) Keep a good work.

1. Limited and unecducated staff with a very low EQ.  
2. Ac spolit and request chg of room.  They request to change and gibe me standing fan. The entire hotel had 1 or 2 guest only.
3. Room not clean at all. Lizard and insects are plents
4. Islamic fanatics. Prayer chatting si loid at 5am.
Totally disappointment

reviews.reviewTitle: Will try other options before coming back
reviews.reviewComments:
No observable reception so we were unsure where to check in,who to request for additional toiletries etc. Fortunately, the staff were passing by the front door when they spotted us. 
We check in at 3pm but our booked additional mattress only come at almost 6pm. Seemed unprepared. 
Moldy spots on ceiling
No toiletries provided. Water is provided a-plenty. 
Tv not working but we couldn't bother to find the staff to adjust it. 
Pillow is musty.

The view from our room was breathtaking, although the location (Iboih) quite far from the jetty..around 1 hour van ride. But it was really worth it because this place is so near to beautiful beache like Pantai Rubiah.
dissapointed as there is no iron provided, no toothbrush, no toothpaste provided, not enough of pillow and towel.
Overall the hotel was good
Gud location,closer to pulai rubiah

reviews.reviewTitle: Très mauvais comparé aux autres hébergements
reviews.reviewComments: Chambres sans charme, pas de vue, literie douteuse, petits vers rouges dans la salle de bain. Beurk

Wifi cuma ada dibahagian lobi shj.. perkhidmatan spt sewa supir, sewa motor, sewa alatan snorkeling juga disediakan.. lunch dan dinner juga ada tetapi dikenakan caj tambahan cuma utk book tiada di agoda means kena call.. view sgt nice.. waktu malam tidak sunyi..

Dah book hotel kt agoda. Tapi bila sampai hotel staf xcheck pon no booking di agoda, dan bagi bilik yang berlainan. So aku tunjuk jenis bilik seperti yang dah booked. At last dapat jgk bilik tu. Toilet pon berbau, pastu boleh plak black out sbb angin kuat. Dugaan btol!Sape yang nak snorkelling di Iboih aku suggest 1 malam je duk area Iboih ni, next day tu better duk area Pulau Sabang, situ byk skit choice makanan..

reviews.reviewTitle: bad bad bad! saya pesan di Agoda untuk arpen bungalow. ternyata dijual lagi ke orang lain.
reviews.reviewComments: Dan saya diberi kamar penginapan "star" berkaca kelihatan dari luar sungguh tidak nyaman.

Staf hotel yang tidak begitu ramah, sewaktu mau check in kamar masih dibersihkan dengan cleaning staf yang hanya 1 orang untuk 3 kamar.
Untuk lokasi sangat strategis dekat dengan pantat dan pelabuhan iboih.
I love this place, dekat dengan pulau rubiah dan berada dipinggir pantai, fasilitas cukup memuaskan, tempat parkir luas
rekomended untuk yang ingin berlibur di pulau sabang, kamar bagus dan bersih, pegawainya sangat ramah dan pelayanannya bagus sekali, apa yg kita butuhkan mereka dapat menyediakannya...
